calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-23-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-23-2004 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Joseph Tursi, Esq. for Plaintiff: David Lai, also present.
Mr. Rosen, Esq. for Defendants: ADTCO and Joe Wang, also present in court.
11:05 a.m. Counsels and parties are present and reached a settlement, terms read into the record as follows: Stipulation for entry of Judgment for possession of the property located at 2121 Evans Ave., San Francisco. Payment of $8,200.00 by cashier's check to Plaintiff before Aug. 26, 2004 and $4,700.00 by Sept. 15, 2004. Future rent is due on the 15th of the month, Mr. Tursi to prepare Judgment.
Parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled, Trial is vacated.
